rationale.ai-review: Proposes AI agent architecture to analyze code and suggest review comments.
rationale.counterpoint: Argues against fully automating code review to preserve team benefits.
rationale.framework: Presents an AI-OS reference architecture for a code review platform.
rationale.design-only: Provides architectural design with realization deferred to a research agenda.
rationale.general-code: The proposed platform targets review of general code, not AI-generated.
